tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: Simple and easy to play on acoustic guitar. Have fun and play with variations of the chords once you're comfortable.

content:
**It's been suggested that the F's in the chorus are Fmaj7's [x33210].
(Because I can't barre I play Fmaj7's for all the F's and it sounds
good that way too.)**

Send in your guitar chords song request @ www.liveloveguitar.com

Standard Tuning          
W/ Capo on 5

[Intro]
[ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]  
[ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]
I know they say, you can't go home again[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
 I just had to come back one last time[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Ma'am I know, you don't know me from Adam[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]                                  [ch]G[/ch]
But these hand prints on the front steps are mine[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]
Up those stairs, in that little back bedroom[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]
Is where I did my homework and I learned to play guitar[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F[/ch]
And I bet you didn't know, under that live oak[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]                             [ch]G[/ch]
My favorite dog is buried in the yard[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]  [ch]F[/ch]                                       [ch]C[/ch]
I thought if I could touch this place, or feel it[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Dm[/ch]                               [ch]C[/ch]
This brokenness inside me might start healin'[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]
Out here it's like I'm someone else,[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]                                [ch]F[/ch]
I thought that maybe I could find myself[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]                                 [ch]F[/ch]
If I could just come in I swear I'll leave[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]C[/ch]
Won't take nothin' but a memory[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
From the house that... built me[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]
Mama cut out pictures of houses for years[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]
From "Better Homes and Garden" magazine[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F[/ch]
Plans were drawn and concrete poured and[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Nail by nail and board by board[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                               [ch]G[/ch]
  Daddy gave life to Mama's dream[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]  [ch]F[/ch]                                       [ch]C[/ch]
I thought if I could touch this place, or feel it[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Dm[/ch]                               [ch]C[/ch]
This brokenness inside me might start healin'[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]
Out here it's like I'm someone else,[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]                                [ch]F[/ch]
I thought that maybe I could find myself[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]                                 [ch]F[/ch]
If I could just come in I swear I'll leave[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]C[/ch]
Won't take nothin' but a memory[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
From the house that... built me[/tab]
 
[Bridge]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]                                 [ch]C[/ch]
You leave home and you move on and you do the best you can[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Dm[/ch]                            [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
I got lost in this old world and forgot, who I am[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]  [ch]F[/ch]                                      [ch]C[/ch]
I thought if I could touch this place or feel it[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Dm[/ch]                               [ch]C[/ch]
This brokenness inside me might start healing[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]
Out here it's like I'm someone else[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]                                [ch]F[/ch]
I thought that maybe I could find myself[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]                                [ch]F[/ch]
If I could walk around I swear I'll leave[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]C[/ch]
Won't take nothin' but a memory[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] -once
From the house that.... built me[/tab]
